title: lolium bromoides
intro: Lolium bromoides, also known as meadow brome or ripgut grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lolium bromoides include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. It is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and is also used in some traditional herbal remedies, such as infusions and tinctures.
